tasks.subject: Task 1: FieldError — hide error once the field is edited
tasks.description:
**Goal:** An inline field error shows only while the field is invalid AND has not been edited since the last validation reset (`!dirty()`).

**Files:**
- Modify: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/field-error.ts
- Test: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/field-error.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pristine+invalid+show shows error
- dirty+invalid+show shows nothing
- existing FieldError tests pass

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-multi-step-form -- field-error

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/field-error.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/field-error.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-multi-step-form -- field-error", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pristine+invalid+show shows error", "dirty+invalid+show shows nothing", "existing FieldError tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Shared spinner + equal-size panel (CSS)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a reusable `.ui-spinner`, give `.ui-card` an equal `min-height`, and right-group the nav row pinned to the bottom.

**Files:**
- Modify: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/ui.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .ui-spinner exists
- .ui-card min-height equalizes steps
- .ui-row flex-end
- .ui-foot margin-top auto
- nx build tommy-host succeeds

**Verify:** pnpm nx build tommy-host

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/ui/ui.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": [".ui-spinner exists", ".ui-card min-height equalizes steps", ".ui-row flex-end", ".ui-foot margin-top auto", "nx build tommy-host succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: MultiStepFlow container — spinners, gate, frozen banner, Back-to-intro
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rework the container: Start/Submit inline spinners, Back grouped right + Back-to-intro with resume, per-step gate with frozen banner + clear-on-edit inline errors via FieldState.reset().

**Files:**
- Modify: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.ts
- Modify: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.html
- Test: libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Start disabled+spinner then advances
- load failure shows inline loadError retry
- Back grouped right; Profile Back->intro; Start resumes with data, no re-fetch
- banner frozen per-step, changes only on Next/Submit
- inline error clears on edit, returns only on next press
- Submit disabled+spinner; success->done; server taken->account inline+banner
- all container tests pass

**Verify:** pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-multi-step-form && pnpm nx build tommy-host

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-multi-step-form && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Start disabled+spinner then advances", "load failure shows inline loadError retry", "Back grouped right; Profile Back->intro; Start resumes with data, no re-fetch", "banner frozen per-step, changes only on Next/Submit", "inline error clears on edit, returns only on next press", "Submit disabled+spinner; success->done; server taken->account inline+banner", "all container tests pass"]}
```
